model.label: GPT-5
model.description: Seed-aware baseline with aggressive favorite bias

picks.rationale: Duke gets the cleanest advance because the seed and efficiency gap are both decisive.
Kentucky survives a volatile 3/11 matchup because of stronger overall talent and shot creation.
Saint Mary's is favored in a slower game where execution matters.
Michigan State gets the nod from better balance and a more trustworthy defense.
Duke projects as the most stable semifinal team and should control the glass.
Michigan State's late-season form gives it a small edge over Saint Mary's.
Duke wins the title in the chalk path because its top-end defense and scoring travel.

reasoning.title: Macro bracket thesis
reasoning.summary: This bracket stays close to the top seeds and only allows one non-trivial stumble opportunity.
evidence: Later rounds prefer roster stability over variance.
Championship pick tracks the strongest two-way profile.

reasoning.title: Inputs used
reasoning.summary: The agent read the configured team metrics, the attached news digest, and the injury notes before locking the card.
